prompt.EN: Create a WhatsApp Flow for a travel agency that allows users to select from four different travel packages (Tropical Beach, Mountain Adventure, City Break, and Historical Tour) using a RadioButtonsGroup and complete the selection with a footer button.

data-source.title: Tropical Beach Vacation
data-source.description: Enjoy 7 nights and 8 days at a luxury beach resort in Bali. Including flights and stays

data-source.title: Mountain Adventure
data-source.description: Embark on a 5-day guided trek in the Swiss Alps. Package includes flights and stays

data-source.title: City Break
data-source.description: Explore the sights and sounds of New York City with our 4 nights and 5 days package

data-source.title: Historical Tour
data-source.description: Take a 7-day historical tour of Rome, Italy. Package includes flights and stays
